flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Illinois College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 930).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Illinois College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (61.1% vs 66.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Illinois College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
